ground_truth.title: FunctionGemma model overview
ground_truth.main_content: FunctionGemma is a specialized version of our Gemma 3 270M model tuned for function calling. It is designed as a strong base for further training into custom, fast, private, local agents that translate natural language into executable API actions. FunctionGemma is the bridge between natural language and software execution. It is the right tool if you have a defined API surface, are ready to fine-tune, prioritize local-first deployment, or are building compound systems. As with other Gemma models, FunctionGemma is provided with open weights and licensed for responsible commercial use.
